title: Elona
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Elona''' was the first month of the [[Tapani calendar]]. It followed the [[Winter Fete/Legends|Winter Fete]], and was followed by [[Kelona]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-06-XX -->''[[Player's Guide to Tapani]]''
*<!-- 1997-07-28 -->''[[Lords of the Expanse]]''
